title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 16 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 16 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 16 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.53 % today, the main contract closed at 965. The steel mills are not active topurchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 985 yuan/mt, PBF at Tangshan port deal 995- 1000 yuan/mt.
